claim_atoms.claim: error as Error → GitHubApiError in service.ts
claim_atoms.evidence: 9 new GitHubApiError({...}) constructor calls found across service.ts (1 in handleResponse, 2 in createPullRequest, 4 in getPullRequestStatus, 2 in listPullRequests). Claim states 6 locations but code has 9 — exceeds the minimum. All catch handlers wrap errors correctly.
Unstaged diff line 248: `- timeToLive: Duration.zero,` → `+ timeToLive: Duration.hours(1),`

claim_atoms.claim: GitHubService layer wired into AppLayer via Layer.provideMerge
claim_atoms.evidence: app-runtime.ts lines 62-124: import of GitHubService, Layer.provideMerge(GitHubService.defaultLayer) in the pipe chain with explicit type annotation Layer.Layer<any, never, never>

claim_atoms.claim: review-tab shows github.noAuth when no token
claim_atoms.evidence:
review-tab.tsx lines 177-182: Show when={!hasToken()} renders

{language.t('github.noAuth')}

. hasToken defined as () => !!token() where token is a createResource fetching via window.api.githubGetToken.

ipc.ts lines ~430-455: Handler extracts event.sender.getURL(), parses origin, validates against oc://renderer (prod), file:// (prod), or process.env.ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL (dev). Validates token type as string and non-empty before encrypting via encryptToken().
4 tests present: GitHubApiError is constructable, GitHubAuthError is constructable, layer factory produces a Layer, defaultLayer composes without errors. All 4 pass (bun test: 4 pass, 0 fail).

packages/opencode.note: Typecheck runs via tsgo --noEmit. No type errors in github/service.ts, account/account.ts, or app-runtime.ts. Pre-existing errors in mcp/index.ts, session/prompt.ts, tui handlers, test files.

packages/app.note: Typecheck runs via tsgo -b. review-tab.tsx has no type errors.

packages/desktop.note: Typecheck via tsgo -b shows 16 errors in ipc.ts, all pre-existing — tsgo fails to resolve symbols defined in the same file (generateCodeVerifier, pendingOAuth, GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, net, etc.). These are Electron-context binding issues, not caused by our github-set-token handler.
